result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could bridge divides, reduce conflict, and foster cooperation on a global scale. It would mean people would prioritize compassion over judgment, seek to understand different perspectives, and act with kindness even in the face of disagreement. I believe this could unravel many of the root causes of suffering, from inequality to violence, because decisions would be made with the well-being of others in mind, not just personal gain or fear. It’s a simple shift in mindset, but its ripple effects could transform how we live together.
